name: DLQ Replay Dataflow Flex Template
description: Launches the DLQ replay Beam pipeline as a Dataflow Flex Template batch job.

parameters.name: config-yaml
parameters.label: Replay config YAML
parameters.helpText: GCS path to the replay configuration YAML file, for example gs://bucket/config/dlq-replay.yaml.

parameters.name: table-name
parameters.label: DLQ table_name filter
parameters.helpText: Optional table_name filter to replay only one logical target.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.label: Replay limit
parameters.helpText: Optional max number of DLQ rows to process in this run.

parameters.name: fix-only
parameters.label: Fix only mode
parameters.helpText: Set to true to write repaired rows only without merging into the target table.
